nasb.text: So they will hang on him all the glory of his father’s house, offspring and issue, all the least of vessels, from bowls to all the jars.

esv.text: And they will hang on him the whole honor of his father’s house, the offspring and issue, every small vessel, from the cups to all the flagons.

cnv.text: 他父家所有的榮耀，他的兒女和子孫以及各樣小器皿，從碗子到瓶子，都掛在他身上。

ccb.text: 他所有的亲属都靠他得荣耀，如同杯子和酒瓶等小器皿挂在一个橛子上。”

csbs.text: 他们要把他父家所有的荣耀，连像瓶瓶罐罐那样至小的子孙和旁亲，都挂在他身上。”
